name: Zephyr RTOS
description: Zephyr RTOS platform, supports multiple architectures and development boards
common_pitfalls: Zephyr priority: lower number = higher priority (same as STM32 FreeRTOS)
Stack allocated by K_THREAD_STACK_DEFINE, not xTaskCreate parameter
Devices must pass device_is_ready() check before use
Peripherals configured via DTS overlay, not manual register operations
CONFIG_HEAP_MEM_POOL_SIZE must be large enough to use k_malloc
Zephyr manages PM automatically, no manual WFI needed
